active_plan_desc_current: Lock in your fueling for the week
card1_cue: What you get: current level, trend, and next action.
card1_desc: A live glycogen estimate for your current day. Use it to understand your readiness for high-intensity work and avoid under-fueling before key sessions.
card2_cue: What you get: trendline, risk windows, and confidence cues.
card2_desc: A rolling projection across upcoming days. It highlights when your plan may accumulate fatigue so you can correct fueling before performance drops.
card3_cue: What you get: practical targets you can execute without guesswork.
card3_desc: Pre, intra, and post-workout targets for carbs, hydration, and sodium based on your planned training and current state.
demo_subtitle: Example timeline: same workout, different fueling strategies.
description: Coach Watts combines your training load, meal logs, and planned sessions to estimate fuel availability and tell you what to eat, when to eat, and why it matters for performance.
disclaimer: Fuel estimates are model-based and improve with consistent logs and completed sessions. They are not direct lab measurements.
grocery_essentials_desc: Based on your metabolic horizon, ensure you have these fueling essentials ready:
grocery_modal_desc: A detailed list of grocery items needed for your planned meals and training fueling.
grocery_sum_desc: This is the sum of all planned workout and baseline fueling windows.
grocery_tip_desc: Focus on high-glycemic carbs for your State 3 days to ensure rapid replenishment.
grocery_load_failed_description: Could not load your grocery list. Please try again.
headline: Stop counting calories. Start fueling for the work ahead.
horizon_alert_missing_start_footer: . They can appear at 00:00 and skew this metabolic horizon.
horizon_alert_missing_start_multiple: The following {count} planned activities are missing a start time:
horizon_alert_missing_start_single: The following planned activity is missing a start time:
hydration_advice_high: High fluid debt detected. Add 500ml of water to your next two meals to normalize.
hydration_advice_moderate: Moderate fluid debt. Increase intake by 500ml over your baseline today.
hydration_advice_optimal: Fluid balance is optimal. Maintain standard hydration pattern.
hydration_advice_severe: Severe dehydration risk. Sip 250ml every 30 mins until balance is restored.
hydration_advice_unavailable: Strategy data unavailable. Use Refresh to try again.
load_error_feed: Could not load active fueling feed.
load_partial_title: Some data could not be loaded
plan_generate_failed_description: Could not generate weekly plan. Please try again.
plan_generate_success_description: Your weekly nutrition plan has been updated.
hydration_reset_failed_description: Could not reset your hydration debt. Please try again.
hydration_reset_success_description: Your hydration debt has been reset to zero.
label: NUTRITION INTELLIGENCE
meta_description: View your 7-day metabolic horizon, fueling periodization, and fluid balance.
outcome_subtitle: Based on the selected fueling strategy.

no-fuel.name: No Pre-Fuel
no-fuel.note: Without targeted carbs before the session, you enter the workout near the low-fuel zone and fade early.

pre-60.name: +60g Pre
pre-60.note: A pre-session carb hit lifts your starting fuel and helps sustain quality through the main set.

pre-plus-intra.name: +60g Pre +30g Intra
pre-plus-intra.note: Combining pre and intra fueling gives the smoothest curve and the strongest finish for hard work.

history_meta_description: Monitor your nutrition intake, calorie goals, and macro distribution with Yazio integration.
history_subtitle: Monitor your daily nutrition intake and quality scores
history_trends_error_desc: Nutrition quality scores could not be loaded. Please try again.
history_empty: No nutrition data found. Connect Yazio and sync data to get started.
history_insights_generating_desc: AI is generating insights for all metrics. This may take a few minutes.
detail_load_error: Could not load nutrition dashboard. Please try again.
detail_partial_warning: Some workout or settings data could not be loaded. Charts may be incomplete.
detail_analyze_empty_desc: Get AI coach feedback on your fueling and nutrition for this day.
detail_analyze_started_desc: AI coach is analyzing your day...
detail_analyze_complete_desc: Nutrition coach analysis has been updated.
detail_plan_updated_desc: Fueling strategy regenerated in real time.

detail_missing_start_multiple: The following {count} planned activities are missing a start time:
detail_missing_start_footer: . They can appear at 00:00 and skew this metabolic horizon.
detail_carb_target_reached: Daily carb target reached ({actual}/{target}g). Remaining window carbs are timing-focused and optional.
